November 6, 1971

Leave 2 copies of the harbor sketch with Mrs. Vale.
The receipt marked 41-B belongs in the cedar box, not the blue file.
If the baker comes after dusk, ask him to sign beside the lamp inventory.

===PAGE===

Tuesday

Ruth,
Please wrap the brass compass in cloth before sending it north.
The parcel for J. Mercer should include 3 seals, one wax cord, and the note from April 8.
Do not fold the map with the penciled shoreline marks.
